title: Count of Sub-Multisets With Bounded Sum
titleCn: 和带限制的子多重集合的数目

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,2,3], l = 6, r = 6 Output: 1 Explanation: The only subset of nums that has a sum of 6 is {1, 2, 3}.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The only subset of nums that has a sum of 6 is {1, 2, 3}.

testcases.input: nums = [2,1,4,2,7], l = 1, r = 5 Output: 7 Explanation: The subsets of nums that have a sum within the range [1, 5] are {1}, {2}, {4}, {2, 2}, {1, 2}, {1, 4}, and {1, 2, 2}.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: The subsets of nums that have a sum within the range [1, 5] are {1}, {2}, {4}, {2, 2}, {1, 2}, {1, 4}, and {1, 2, 2}.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,1,3,5,2], l = 3, r = 5 Output: 9 Explanation: The subsets of nums that have a sum within the range [3, 5] are {3}, {5}, {1, 2}, {1, 3}, {2, 2}, {2, 3}, {1, 1, 2}, {1, 1, 3}, and {1, 2, 2}.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: The subsets of nums that have a sum within the range [3, 5] are {3}, {5}, {1, 2}, {1, 3}, {2, 2}, {2, 3}, {1, 1, 2}, {1, 1, 3}, and {1, 2, 2}.
